---
title: "Relationship Mining"
bibliography: lit/references.bib
---

\[Badge Image Placeholder\]

Relationship mining reveals meaningful patterns and associations within datasets through three key techniques: Correlation Mining, Association Rule Mining, and Sequential Pattern Mining. These complementary approaches form a powerful toolkit for uncovering hidden data relationships that drive strategic decision-making in business intelligence and recommendation systems. Note: While this module was rendered using Quarto via RStudio/Posit Cloud, it mainly focuses on Python as its main language.

+-------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/github.png){width="40"}              | **Github\                            | [Repository for Instructors](https://github.com/laser-institute/Relationship-Mining?tab=readme-ov-file)               |
|                                                 | **                                   |                                                                                                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/posit.png){width="40"}               | **Posit Cloud**                      | [Workspace for Learners](https://posit.cloud/spaces/493094/join?access_code=qjsumVzA0HZYgrxOSizVbVPmDs7iHYS32yUQaqDe) |
+-------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/conceptual-overview.png){width="40"} | **Relationship Mining Basics**       | [Slide Deck](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/module-6-relationship-mining-basics/#/title-slide)                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

## Module 1: Correlation Mining

Correlation mining quantifies statistical relationships between variables using metrics like Pearson's coefficient, indicating how changes in one variable relate to another without implying causation.

+-------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/conceptual-overview.png){width="40"} | [**Conceptual\                                                                                       |
|                                                 | Overview**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/module-6-correlation-mining/#/title-slide)                    |
+-------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/code-along.png){width="40"}          | [**Code Along**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/module-1-correlation-mining/#/title-slide)               |
+-------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/reading.png){width="40"}             | [**Readings &\                                                                                       |
|                                                 | Reflection**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/module-6-relationship-mining-readings/#/correlation-mining) |
+-------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/case-study.png){width="40"}          | [**Case Study**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/kt-6-correlation-mining-case-study/)                     |
+-------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/survey.png){width="47" height="40"}  | [**Module Survey**](https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/LAWF_Mod4_July24)                                 |
+-------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

## Module 2: Association Rule Mining

Association Rule Mining (ARM) discovers co-occurrence relationships as "if-then" rules, measuring strengths through support, confidence, and lift metrics to reveal product affinities and purchasing patterns.

+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/conceptual-overview.png){width="40"} | [**Conceptual\                                                                                                                          |
|                                                 | Overview**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/module-2-association-rule-mining/#/title-slide)                                                  |
+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/code-along.png){width="40"}          | [**Code Along**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/module-2-association-rule-mining-950d/#/title-slide)                                        |
+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/reading.png){width="40"}             | [**Readings &\                                                                                                                          |
|                                                 | Reflection**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/module-6-relationship-mining-readings/#/association-rule-mining-and-sequential-pattern-mining) |
+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/case-study.png){width="40"}          | [**Case Study**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/module-2-association-rule-mining-ded6/)                                                     |
+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/survey.png){width="47" height="40"}  | [**Module Survey**](https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/LAWF_Mod4_July24)                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

## Module 3: Sequential Pattern Mining

Sequential Pattern Mining (SPM) identifies frequently occurring ordered sequences of events across time-series data, essential for predicting behaviors in applications from customer purchases to website navigation.

+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/conceptual-overview.png){width="40"} | [**Conceptual\                                                                                                                          |
|                                                 | Overview**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/module-3-sequential-pattern-mining-4cd0/#/title-slide)                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/code-along.png){width="40"}          | [**Code Along**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/module-3-sequential-pattern-mining-98e4/#/title-slide)                                      |
+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/reading.png){width="40"}             | [**Readings &\                                                                                                                          |
|                                                 | Reflection**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/module-6-relationship-mining-readings/#/association-rule-mining-and-sequential-pattern-mining) |
+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/case-study.png){width="40"}          | [**Case Study**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/module-3-sequential-pattern-mining/)                                                        |
+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ![](images/survey.png){width="47" height="40"}  | [**Module Survey**](https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/LAWF_Mod4_July24)                                                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

## Microcredential

The culminating activity for the Relationship Mining modules is designed to provide you some space for independent analysis of a self-identified data source. To earn your Relationship Mining Microcredential, you must demonstrate your ability to formulate a relevant research question for relationship mining, effectively manage and analyze data, and clearly communicate your key findings. Your primary goal for this analysis is to create a simple data product that illustrates key findings by applying the knowledge and skills acquired from the essential readings and case studies.

+-----------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------+
| \[Image placeholder\] | [**Microcredential**](https://laserkt.quarto.pub/relmin-badge-activity/) | Relmin Track Badge Activity |
+-----------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------+

## References
